name: Wanpy Dog Food Chicken & Vegetables 375g
shortDescription: WANPY Chicken & Vegetables Canned Dog Food 375g: Premium wet food with lean chicken, fiber-rich veggies, vitamins A, C, E for all breeds. Boosts digestion, immunity, and muscle health. No artificial additives complete balanced meal!
description: Treat your loyal companion to WANPY Chicken & Vegetables Canned Dog Food 375g – a premium wet food that offers a complete and balanced diet for dogs of all breeds and ages. This nutritious meal features high-quality lean chicken as the primary protein source, combined with fiber-rich vegetables like carrots and peas, all slow-cooked in a savory broth to lock in natural flavors and nutrients. Free from artificial preservatives, colors, or flavors, it provides an easily digestible, juicy texture that’s perfect for puppies, adults, and seniors alike. Whether served as a standalone meal or a flavorful topper for dry kibble, WANPY ensures every bite supports your dog’s overall health and vitality. Key Ingredients Main Protein: High-quality lean chicken for essential amino acids and energy. Vegetables: Carrots and peas for fiber, phytonutrients, and digestive support. Vitamins & Minerals: Enriched with vitamins A, C, and E; plus other essential nutrients for immunity, skin, and eye health. Other: Slow cooked in broth with no artificial additives. This wholesome formula promotes a natural diet without compromises. Nutritional Features Feature Benefits Lean Chicken Supports muscle development, repair, energy, and daily activity levels. Fiber-Rich Vegetables Aids digestion, promotes bowel regularity, healthy weight, and satiety. Enriched Vitamins & Minerals Strengthens immunity, maintains skin health, eye function, and overall well-being. No Artificial Additives Ensures a pure, wholesome, and safe meal for long-term feeding. Feeding Guidelines Serve as a complete balanced meal or mix with dry kibble to boost flavor and moisture. Suitable for dogs of all ages, breeds, and sizes – adjust portions based on age, weight, and activity level: Small Dogs (up to 10kg): 1/2 to 1 can per day. Medium Dogs (10-25kg): 1 to 2 cans per day. Large Dogs (over 25kg): 2+ cans per day. Provide fresh water at all times. Refrigerate unused portions after opening and consume within 48 hours for optimal freshness. Key Benefits Premium Protein Source: Chicken delivers amino acids for muscle maintenance and vitality. Digestive Wellness: Vegetables provide fiber to support healthy digestion and weight management. Immune & Skin Support: Vitamins A, C, and E enhance immunity, promote shiny skin, and maintain eye health. All-Life-Stages Formula: Ideal for puppies, adults, and seniors with sensitive stomachs. Gentle & Palatable: Easily digestible for dogs with dietary sensitivities; no artificial ingredients. Convenient & Versatile: 375g can offers flexible portions – perfect alone or as a kibble enhancer.
